item.title: Six Claude projects that all came from the same question: “why not?”
item.description: Six Claude projects that all came from the same question: “why not?”

item.title:
Kay Zhu is the co-founder and CTO of @genspark_ai, the all-in-one AI workspace built on Claude.
In a market moving this fast, where anyone can build, he thinks the team is what makes the difference:
item.description:
Kay Zhu is the co-founder and CTO of @genspark_ai, the all-in-one AI workspace built on Claude.
In a market moving this fast, where anyone can build, he thinks the team is what makes the difference: https://t.co/1fdpKpxjqj

item.title: Tinkering, prototyping, and seeing what happens with Claude Design:
item.description: Tinkering, prototyping, and seeing what happens with Claude Design:

item.title:
Scott Wu (@ScottWu46) runs @cognition, the team behind Devin, an AI software engineer built on Claude.
He wants to make building software 10x faster for every engineering team: https://t.co/5AKOp2vX
item.description:
Scott Wu (@ScottWu46) runs @cognition, the team behind Devin, an AI software engineer built on Claude.
He wants to make building software 10x faster for every engineering team: https://t.co/5AKOp2vXE6

item.title: Live from Code with Claude London: we're launching self-hosted sandboxes (public beta) and MCP tunnels (research preview) in Claude Managed Agents. Run agents inside your own perimeter, with your secu
item.description: Live from Code with Claude London: we're launching self-hosted sandboxes (public beta) and MCP tunnels (research preview) in Claude Managed Agents. Run agents inside your own perimeter, with your security controls applied by default. https://t.co/cxvmk3feHp

item.title:
You can now create more with Claude Design.
We've doubled token limits across every plan. https://t.co/d2AemkZUxW
item.description:
You can now create more with Claude Design.
We've doubled token limits across every plan. https://t.co/d2AemkZUxW

item.title:
Next stop: London.
Register to tune in tomorrow for deep dives, demos, and conversations with the teams behind Claude: https://t.co/6le4bIXvJt
item.description:
Next stop: London.
Register to tune in tomorrow for deep dives, demos, and conversations with the teams behind Claude: https://t.co/6le4bIXvJt

item.title:
RT @ClaudeDevs: Claude Code weekly limits are increasing 50%, now through July 13.
Live now for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterpr…
item.description:

item.title: We gave people tiny computers at Code with Claude. Here are some of the small, delightful things they built: https://t.co/3Av12x4DCb
item.description: We gave people tiny computers at Code with Claude. Here are some of the small, delightful things they built: https://t.co/3Av12x4DCb

item.title:
New in Claude Code: agent view.
One list of all your sessions, available today as a research preview. https://t.co/NnbsAQjSPW
item.description:
New in Claude Code: agent view.
One list of all your sessions, available today as a research preview. https://t.co/NnbsAQjSPW

item.title:
The Claude Platform on AWS is now generally available.
AWS customers get the full set of Claude API features, with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. https://t.co/9WPrEgCpkg
item.description:
The Claude Platform on AWS is now generally available.
AWS customers get the full set of Claude API features, with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. https://t.co/9WPrEgCpkg

item.title:
Claude for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word are now generally available, and Claude for Outlook is in public beta.
As Claude moves between your Microsoft apps, it carries the full context of your conversa
item.description:
Claude for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word are now generally available, and Claude for Outlook is in public beta.
As Claude moves between your Microsoft apps, it carries the full context of your conversation. https://t.co/l8oOcoFcHg

item.title:
Join us at 1pm PT for a conversation with our co-founders Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei, moderated by Chief Product Officer Ami Vora.
https://t.co/InUxTaNimb
item.description:
Join us at 1pm PT for a conversation with our co-founders Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei, moderated by Chief Product Officer Ami Vora.
https://t.co/InUxTaNimb

item.title:
Live from Code with Claude: we're launching dreaming in Claude Managed Agents as a research preview.
Outcomes, multiagent orchestration, and webhooks are now in public beta. https://t.co/p4DFRzFEd8
item.description:
Live from Code with Claude: we're launching dreaming in Claude Managed Agents as a research preview.
Outcomes, multiagent orchestration, and webhooks are now in public beta. https://t.co/p4DFRzFEd8

item.title:
We’ve agreed to a partnership with @SpaceX that will substantially increase our compute capacity.
This, along with our other recent compute deals, means that we’ve been able to increase our usage lim
item.description:
We’ve agreed to a partnership with @SpaceX that will substantially increase our compute capacity.
This, along with our other recent compute deals, means that we’ve been able to increase our usage limits for Claude Code and the Claude API.

item.title:
RT @ClaudeDevs: Code with Claude is happening now!
▪︎ 9:00AM - Keynote ▪︎ 10:30AM - What's new in Claude Code ▪︎ 11:15AM - Building on C…
item.description:

▪︎ 9:00AM - Keynote ▪︎ 10:30AM - What's new in Claude Code ▪︎ 11:15AM - Building on C…

item.title:
New for financial services: ready-to-run Claude agent templates for building pitches, conducting valuation reviews, closing the books at month-end, and more.
Install them as plugins in Cowork and Cla
item.description:
New for financial services: ready-to-run Claude agent templates for building pitches, conducting valuation reviews, closing the books at month-end, and more.
Install them as plugins in Cowork and Claude Code, or use our cookbooks to run them in production as Managed Agents. https://t.co/Nzj4Feaaz2

item.title:
Code with Claude, our developer conference, returns next week.
Whether you're just getting started with Claude Code or you've been building for a while, there's a session for you.
Register for the l
item.description:
Code with Claude, our developer conference, returns next week.
Whether you're just getting started with Claude Code or you've been building for a while, there's a session for you.
Register for the livestream: https://t.co/GJwOPMDLEC https://t.co/uwAZgWPu7F

item.title:
Claude Security is now in public beta for Claude Enterprise customers.
Claude scans your codebase for vulnerabilities, validates each finding to cut false positives, and suggests patches you can revi
item.description:
Claude Security is now in public beta for Claude Enterprise customers.
Claude scans your codebase for vulnerabilities, validates each finding to cut false positives, and suggests patches you can review and approve. https://t.co/neYmbGYeRz

item.title:
Another Claude Code hackathon comes to an end.
Thank you to everyone who spent a week building with Opus 4.7, and to @cerebral_valley for co-hosting.
Introducing the winners:
item.description:
Another Claude Code hackathon comes to an end.
Thank you to everyone who spent a week building with Opus 4.7, and to @cerebral_valley for co-hosting.
Introducing the winners:

item.title:
Claude now connects to the tools creative professionals already use.
With the new Blender connector, you can debug a scene, build new tools, or batch-apply changes across every object, directly from
item.description:
Claude now connects to the tools creative professionals already use.
With the new Blender connector, you can debug a scene, build new tools, or batch-apply changes across every object, directly from Claude. https://t.co/Kc3cBHTNpV
